ocr_findings.description: The 貸借対照表 sample table (showing 資産・負債・純資産 with numeric values 百万円, rows for 現金・売掛金・商品 on left and 借入金・資本金・利益剰余金 on right) is rendered as 'img-0.jpeg' placeholder. All numeric cell values and row labels are absent from OCR output.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 貸借対照表 definition, B/S concept, 総資産/他人資本/自己資本 terminology, and 資本金の位置. Body text is well transcribed. The balance-sheet sample table is an embedded diagram image and its cell data is not captured in OCR — this is a meaningful loss since the table illustrates key numeric relationships, rated med severity.
